chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3786 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 892/18 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 16603/17 4. For Katcha Peshi. 23.01.2018. Mr. Ashique Hussain D. Solangi, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Urgency disposed of. At the very outset learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press prayer Clause-B of this petition. We have perused the case papers as well as prayer Clause-C showing that in this matter petitioner is claiming that F.I.R. bearing crime No.6/2017 under section 344 PPC of P.S Thebath registered against the petitioner may be quashed. During course of arguments, we have specifically asked the question from learned Counsel for the petitioner that whether the case under crime No.6/2017 has been challaned, learned counsel for the petitioner answered in affirmative. It means that the trial court has already taken the cognizance of the case. Under this situation, we are not inclined to grant the relief as mentioned in the prayer clause. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to file any application for premature acquittal before the trial court for redressal of his grievance if he so desires and trial court shall then decide the same as per law. However, in the meantime, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
